status:
Insulation pinhole NG detected in the Back Overlay Vision at Cathode Roll Press machine #2 (Lot ID: 2CEKL1A6R1).
 Detection failure of the insulation width edge caused the defect ROI to expand due to insufficient red-light reflection, resulting in over-inspection
act: Insulation edge alignment was verified and GV (Gain Value) was adjusted to correct the issue.
status_en:
Insulation pinhole NG detected in the Back Overlay Vision at Cathode Roll Press machine #2 (Lot ID: 2CEKL1A6R1).
 Detection failure of the insulation width edge caused the defect ROI to expand due to insufficient red-light reflection, resulting in over-inspection
act_en: Insulation edge alignment was verified and GV (Gain Value) was adjusted to correct the issue.

status:

status_en:
Tab press extended into the insulation area and was not detected by vision, resulting in approximately 15 meters of defects
 The electrode shifted, moving outside the ROI region, leading to missed detection and Intermixing occurrence
act_en: Inspected ROI settings, added classification separation criteria, and reviewed line-stop function

status:
Issue: - Tab press surface contamination caused imprint marks.
  → Defect not detected during inspection; reviewing original image (tab blank area is saturated due to excessive lighting, making the imprint invisible).
- After tab break connection, misalignment occurred, causing tab press to intrude into coated area.
  → Line stopped and material removed.
  → During tab press adjustment, electrode alignment fluctuated significantly left and right, resulting in overlay over-detection 
    (expande
act:
- Confirm original image and review tab blank area detection configuration.
- Stopped the line and performed removal work for misaligned material.
- Adjusted tab press position.
- Recommended inspection of lighting angle and ROI to prevent over-detection at insulation boundary.
status_en:
Issue: - Tab press surface contamination caused imprint marks.
  → Defect not detected during inspection; reviewing original image (tab blank area is saturated due to excessive lighting, making the imprint invisible).
- After tab break connection, misalignment occurred, causing tab press to intrude into coated area.
  → Line stopped and material removed.
  → During tab press adjustment, electrode alignment fluctuated significantly left and right, resulting in overlay over-detection 
    (expande
act_en:
- Confirm original image and review tab blank area detection configuration.
- Stopped the line and performed removal work for misaligned material.
- Adjusted tab press position.
- Recommended inspection of lighting angle and ROI to prevent over-detection at insulation boundary.

status:
Issue:  Production team inquired about multiple mismatch occurrences on Cathode Rollpress #2.
  Mismatch defects were concentrated at the lot start or end section.  
When the material is cut and reconnected, lateral deviation (weaving) occurs, leading to mismatch detection.  
Given that the distance from the unwinder to the vision inspection zone is approximately 20 meters, defects naturally appear in either the early or final section of each lot.  
Issue identified as a **single-event, non-repe
act:
Explained to the production team that the mismatches observed in recent lots originate from weaving that occurs at the splice area during lot cutting and reconnection.  
Confirmed that occurrences were limited to the lot start and mid-lot splice area (one-time events).
status_en:
Issue:  Production team inquired about multiple mismatch occurrences on Cathode Rollpress #2.
  Mismatch defects were concentrated at the lot start or end section.  
When the material is cut and reconnected, lateral deviation (weaving) occurs, leading to mismatch detection.  
Given that the distance from the unwinder to the vision inspection zone is approximately 20 meters, defects naturally appear in either the early or final section of each lot.  
Issue identified as a **single-event, non-repe
act_en:
Explained to the production team that the mismatches observed in recent lots originate from weaving that occurs at the splice area during lot cutting and reconnection.  
Confirmed that occurrences were limited to the lot start and mid-lot splice area (one-time events).

Defects assessed as actual material defects.  
The defective area corresponds to the Rollmap scrap section, with marking drift observed approximately 30 meters prior to the scrap zone.
  Material-related marking shift occurring upstream (approx. -30 m) from the Rollmap scrap region, leading to true pinhole defects

status:
Issue:  Mismatch detected.

status:
Issue:
SDC interlock alarm occurred during operation.


A temporary SDC interlock condition was triggered. No abnormality was found during inspection
act: The alarm was cleared from the master system. The operator was instructed to reset the equipment and restart the process. Normal operation was confirmed. Shared with production team.
status_en:
Issue:
SDC interlock alarm occurred during operation.


A temporary SDC interlock condition was triggered. No abnormality was found during inspection
act_en: The alarm was cleared from the master system. The operator was instructed to reset the equipment and restart the process. Normal operation was confirmed. Shared with production team.

status:
Issue:
Inspection PC alarm occurred during operation.


A temporary software-related issue in the inspection and pinhole inspection programs. No abnormality was found during equipment inspection
act: The inspection program and pinhole inspection program were restarted. Normal operation was confirmed. Shared with production team.
status_en:
Issue:
Inspection PC alarm occurred during operation.


A temporary software-related issue in the inspection and pinhole inspection programs. No abnormality was found during equipment inspection
act_en: The inspection program and pinhole inspection program were restarted. Normal operation was confirmed. Shared with production team.

status:
Issue:
Periodic scratch was detected during inspection.


Foreign material was attached to the back surface camera, causing false scratch detection. No abnormality was found in the equipment condition
act: Foreign material on the back surface camera was removed. Normal operation was confirmed. Shared with production team.
status_en:
Issue:
Periodic scratch was detected during inspection.


Foreign material was attached to the back surface camera, causing false scratch detection. No abnormality was found in the equipment condition
act_en: Foreign material on the back surface camera was removed. Normal operation was confirmed. Shared with production team.

status:
Issue:
Periodic scratch was detected during inspection.


Image review confirmed that the detected scratch matched an actual defect
act: The image and actual product were reviewed together with the production team. The issue was confirmed as an actual defect and was reported to the production team for further handling. Shared with production team.
status_en:
Issue:
Periodic scratch was detected during inspection.


Image review confirmed that the detected scratch matched an actual defect
act_en: The image and actual product were reviewed together with the production team. The issue was confirmed as an actual defect and was reported to the production team for further handling. Shared with production team.

status:
Issue:
Defects were not displayed on the roll map in the master program.


Insufficient storage capacity on the D drive caused improper display of defect data
act: Disk space on the D drive was secured, and the roll map display returned to normal. Other machines were also checked, and no abnormalities were found. Normal operation was confirmed. Shared with production team.
status_en:
Issue:
Defects were not displayed on the roll map in the master program.


Insufficient storage capacity on the D drive caused improper display of defect data
act_en: Disk space on the D drive was secured, and the roll map display returned to normal. Other machines were also checked, and no abnormalities were found. Normal operation was confirmed. Shared with production team.

status:
Issue:
Mismatch occurred during inspection.


The Back surface Find Foil threshold value was set too high, causing a mismatch condition
act:
The Back surface Find Foil threshold parameter was adjusted from 70 to 63 and then to 58. Normal operation was confirmed. Shared with production team.

NOTE:
Further monitoring is planned.
status_en:
Issue:
Mismatch occurred during inspection.


The Back surface Find Foil threshold value was set too high, causing a mismatch condition
act_en:
The Back surface Find Foil threshold parameter was adjusted from 70 to 63 and then to 58. Normal operation was confirmed. Shared with production team.

NOTE:
Further monitoring is planned.

Tab press coating overlap popup alarm occurred during inspection.


A coating overlap condition was detected by the tab press inspection algorithm. Further verification was required to determine whether it was an actual defect
act: Tab press coating overlap images were reviewed together with the production team, and confirmation of the actual product was requested for the range of 1350 to 1410 meters. Shared with production team.
status_en:

A coating overlap condition was detected by the tab press inspection algorithm. Further verification was required to determine whether it was an actual defect
act_en: Tab press coating overlap images were reviewed together with the production team, and confirmation of the actual product was requested for the range of 1350 to 1410 meters. Shared with production team.

Issue : OS Top Side 레드 사이드 조명 Power off

Action : 재 커넥트 후 조치되었으나 부동 시점에 컨트롤러 커넥터 부 문제인지 컨트롤러 자체 재고확인 후 있다면 스왑 -> 재발생 -> 원인파악: 조명컨트롤러,조명,조명연결커넥트 교체 및 볼테이지 측정기로 판넬 전원부 및 조명 컨트롤러 확인 , 연장 케이블 데미지있는지 확인 

조치사항: CAM1 사이드조명 연장케이블 피복 데미지 확인하여 잘라낸후 케이블 재연결
